name: Franchise Architect: Football
currentFocus: Session 54 exhausted five live-code audit objectives and two second-order innovations: coherent session truth, exact cap-service delegation, a transactional Architect ledger, one Now/Season/Legacy Blueprint, descriptive non-causal decision memory, and universal HTTPS Studio link-back enforcement.

5 new API endpoints (season-arcs, gm-decision, records/franchise, team-archetypes, franchise-moment)
Mobile 375px overflow fixes across all new modals
